cluster_label: Pretend play with people, places and feelings
gift_note: Good gift for a nearly-three who already narrates trips and help jobs ,  check cupboard first for Happyland and DUPLO overlap.
ownership_note: Happyland and DUPLO sets duplicate heavily across UK homes and nurseries. Bring back out or borrow before buying another bus or vehicle pack.
educational_objective: Child acts out whole scenes with people and vehicles: get in, go somewhere, help, return ,  with roles and feelings attached, not just pushing a car.
age_stage_nuance: At nearly three the play is a short story (who goes, why they help, what happens when they get back), not solitary vehicle zooming from the earlier toddler years.
what_to_look_for: Chunky people plus a place or vehicle that supports get-in / go / help / return; toddler lines (Happyland, DUPLO 2+, Playmobil Junior 1-4) with figures that fit little hands.
what_to_avoid: Classic Playmobil with under-3 / Ages 3+ only marks, loose tiny accessories, single cars with no people, and generic listings that do not open a real product page.
methodology: Benchmarked UK toddler small-world lines (Happyland, DUPLO Town 2+, Playmobil Junior 1-4) against the whole-scene brief of get-in / go / help / return, discarding classic Playmobil and any set whose live age mark failed the 34-36m band. Captured age signals from brand or retailer pages (Moonpig 12 months+, LEGO/Hamleys 2+, Playmobil Junior 1-4). Ranked by scene strength for people-places-feelings pretend, ownership risk, and review depth where scrapeable. Every Top 5 primary URL was re-verified live via stage3-url-preflight.mjs (HTTP 200) on 2026-07-22 before the final order and buying_factor_memo were locked. Availability screening (stage3-availability-check.mjs) added 2026-07-22 to reject retired/discontinued and notify-when-in-stock primaries.
buying_factor_memo: Five factors set order. First, whole-scene fit: sets that make get-in, go, help and return easy beat lone vehicles or build-only packs. Second, age overlap: only Happyland / DUPLO 2+ / Playmobil Junior 1-4 ,  never classic Playmobil under-3 exclusions. Third, figure quality: chunky people the child can seat and move. Fourth, ownership risk: Happyland buses and common DUPLO vehicles are cupboard staples, so borrow-first language stays honest even when they win on fit. Fifth, review honesty: where UK review widgets would not scrape cleanly (Happyland on Moonpig; Playmobil Junior brand pages; retired DUPLO Bus Ride screened out by availability gate), specialist exemption is declared with a written reason instead of inventing counts; DUPLO Construction Vehicles keeps a hard Amazon UK rating (4.8 / 287).

editorial_sources_checked: Yeah Lifestyle Playmobil Junior farm review

top_picks.age_mark_on_listing: Suitable for age 12 months + (Moonpig); ELC / Entertainer also list Ages 2-5

key_specs.included_items: London bus, 3 characters, bus stop sign; 2x AA batteries included

top_picks.product_description_under_30_words: Chunky red London bus with seats for little people.
top_picks.ember_verdict: A chunky red bus with seats for little people: load them up, drive somewhere, tip them out, and do it again. Lovely for journeys once they start narrating trips. Bring it back out if a Happyland bus is already at nursery or in the cupboard.
top_picks.personalization_hint: likely to seat figures, announce stops, and retell a short outing
top_picks.why_it_fits: Bus + stop + people make a whole mini story without tiny classic-Playmobil parts.
top_picks.gift_note: Only gift if you know they do not already have a Happyland bus.
top_picks.ownership_note: Borrow or bring back out - Happyland buses turn up in hand-me-downs and nurseries.
top_picks.rating_source: Not exposed on Moonpig product page; ELC bot-blocked (403) for agents
top_picks.review_quality_note: Specialist exemption , live UK review widget could not be scraped honestly on the working primary.
top_picks.preloved_signal_note: Common second-hand; check deck latch and figure condition.
top_picks.rank_rationale: #1 over #2: Happyland hands the child ready-made people and a stop for get-on / go / return with zero build friction, so it edges DUPLO Bus Ride when the brief is whole-scene pretend rather than brick play.
top_picks.evidence_notes: Primary Moonpig URL smoke-checked HTTP 200 on 2026-07-22 and opens the TEAL/ELC Happyland London Bus product (SKU 549251), not a category listing. Age taken from Moonpig (12 months+) plus Entertainer Ages 2-5 overlap. Rating widgets were not available on the live primary; ELC returned 403 to agents , specialist exemption declared rather than inventing a review count.

top_picks.best_for_tag: Best for airport board and go

key_specs.included_items: Airport shuttle with passenger figures (per brand page)

top_picks.product_description_under_30_words: PLAYMOBIL Junior airport shuttle with figures for travel play.
top_picks.ember_verdict: An airport shuttle for holiday and travel stories, with Junior figures sized for little hands. A nice way to practise get-on, go, and come-back play beyond the London bus.
top_picks.personalization_hint: likely to line figures up to board and announce stops
top_picks.why_it_fits: Board, go, arrive - whole-scene travel on Junior age marks with chunky people.
top_picks.gift_note: Good gift for travel-obsessed nearly-threes who already have a Happyland bus.
top_picks.ownership_note: Lower duplication than Happyland; pairs well with #1 rather than replacing it.
top_picks.rating_source: Not exposed on playmobil.com Junior product page
top_picks.review_quality_note: Specialist exemption , buyable primary verified by availability check 2026-07-22.
top_picks.preloved_signal_note: Newer Junior SKU — thinner second-hand market.
top_picks.rank_rationale: #2 over #3: Airport board-and-go keeps the travel story from #1 but adds a different setting; it replaces retired/out-of-stock DUPLO Bus Ride 10988 after availability screening failed that SKU.
top_picks.evidence_notes: Playmobil brand URL smoke- and availability-checked buyable on 2026-07-22. DUPLO Bus Ride removed from Top 5: Hamleys primary showed notify-when-in-stock and LEGO.com marks retired product.

top_picks.age_mark_on_listing: Age: 1 years and up / Junior 1-4 years

key_specs.included_items: Everyday hero figures with emergency / traffic play features (per brand page)

top_picks.product_description_under_30_words: PLAYMOBIL Junior helper set with doctor, fire and police figures.
top_picks.ember_verdict: Helper figures for stories where someone needs looking after. Supports pretend play about kindness and jobs, with Junior pieces that suit this age.
top_picks.personalization_hint: likely to assign jobs and narrate helping someone
top_picks.why_it_fits: Help roles give feelings and places to the pretend scene beyond travel alone.
top_picks.gift_note: Strong gift if the child already talks about helpers; avoid if classic Playmobil (3+) is what was requested.
top_picks.ownership_note: Less ubiquitous than Happyland buses - lower duplication risk.
top_picks.rating_source: Not exposed on playmobil.com Junior product page
top_picks.review_quality_note: Specialist exemption for Junior line age-correct set without scrapeable UK reviews.
top_picks.preloved_signal_note: Newer Junior line — thinner second-hand market than Happyland/DUPLO.
top_picks.rank_rationale: #3 over #4: Help-and-rescue roles match the cluster feelings brief more tightly than dump-truck load/tip play, so Everyday Heroes sits above the Dump Truck despite similar Junior age marks.
top_picks.evidence_notes: Playmobil brand URL smoke-checked HTTP 200 on 2026-07-22. Age mark is Junior 1-4 / 1 year and up , overlaps 34-36m. No scrapeable rating_count on the brand page; specialist exemption declared with written reason rather than inventing stars.

top_picks.age_mark_on_listing: Age: 1 years and up / Junior 1-4 years

key_specs.format: Junior dump truck + figure + stack stones
key_specs.included_items: Dump truck, construction worker, numbered stackable stones

top_picks.product_description_under_30_words: PLAYMOBIL Junior dump truck for load, tip and go play.
top_picks.ember_verdict: A dump truck for load, tip, stack and go-back play with one clear figure. Simple work trips that help them build little stories with a beginning and an end.
top_picks.personalization_hint: likely to enjoy repeating a load-and-tip job story
top_picks.why_it_fits: Clear go / work / return loop with chunky Junior parts.
top_picks.caveats: Thinner public UK review scrape than DUPLO Construction; specialist exemption.
top_picks.gift_note: Nice mid-price gift for vehicle lovers who already have a people set.
top_picks.rating_source: Not exposed on playmobil.com Junior product page
top_picks.review_quality_note: Specialist exemption , brand page age-correct, reviews not scrapeable.
top_picks.preloved_signal_note: Check tipping axle and stones present if buying second-hand.
top_picks.rank_rationale: #4 over #5: One figure plus a tipping bed gives a clearer single job story than the multi-rebuild Construction Vehicles set, even though 10475 has stronger Amazon UK ratings.
top_picks.evidence_notes: Playmobil brand URL smoke-checked HTTP 200 on 2026-07-22. Junior 1-4 age mark overlaps the band. Specialist exemption for missing scrapeable review counts on the brand page.

top_picks.price_text: £13.99 (John Lewis list observed; confirm Hamleys till)

key_specs.included_items: Pieces to rebuild dump truck / digger / loader style vehicles

top_picks.product_description_under_30_words: LEGO DUPLO construction vehicles to build and rebuild.
top_picks.ember_verdict: Chunky DUPLO vehicles for building, driving and rebuilding. A sturdy next step when bus and helper sets already feel covered, with plenty of room for their own job stories.
top_picks.personalization_hint: likely to rebuild vehicles and narrate site jobs
top_picks.why_it_fits: Supports go / work / return with chunky 2+ bricks, though figures are thinner than Happyland or Junior heroes.
top_picks.gift_note: Safe gift for a DUPLO house; less ideal as the only small-world set if they need people play.
top_picks.ownership_note: Common DUPLO set - check the brick box first.
top_picks.review_quality_note: Hard pass on 4.4 / 15 , 4.8 from 287 global ratings on Amazon UK.
top_picks.preloved_signal_note: Easy to top up second-hand DUPLO.
top_picks.rank_rationale: #5 as the ratings-backed rebuild option: it earns the last Top 5 slot on review depth and 2+ age fit, while sitting behind clearer people-scene sets on educational match.
top_picks.evidence_notes: Primary switched from Hamleys to Amazon UK after Hamleys blocked automated availability fetch; Amazon UK confirmed buyable 2026-07-22 with 4.8/287 ratings.

guidance_notes.title: Junior vs classic Playmobil
guidance_notes.body: For 34-36m, only Playmobil Junior (1-4 / 12 months+) belongs in the shortlist. Classic Playmobil under-3 exclusions fail the band.

guidance_notes.title: Borrow the bus first
guidance_notes.body: Happyland London Bus is a UK staple — check cupboard and nursery before buying new.

conor_five_tests.notes: Borrow-first on Happyland; Junior-only Playmobil call-out; Construction Vehicles ranked last despite strongest ratings.

qa_summary.url_preflight: Top 5 primaries all HTTP 200 via stage3-url-preflight.mjs on 2026-07-22
qa_summary.rating_honesty: Four Top Picks use specialist exemption with written reasons; Construction Vehicles uses Amazon UK 4.8/287
open_founder_flags: confirm_reviews_on_human_click for Happyland and Playmobil Junior
